name: Bernstein-Vazirani
code:
if n_qubits < 2:
    raise ValueError("BV requires at least 2 qubits.")

circ = Circuit(n_qubits)
target = n_qubits - 1

for i in range(target):
    circ.H(i)

circ.X(target)
circ.H(target)
circ.add_barrier(range(n_qubits))

for i in range(target):
    circ.CX(i, target)
    
circ.add_barrier(range(n_qubits))
    
for i in range(target):
    circ.H(i)
    
qasm = circuit_to_qasm_str(circ)
